mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in the unemployment rate above 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit margins and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and low interest rates (FEDFUNDS) create stagflationary risks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high inflation and low rates.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) indicate robust supply-side growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 40% of instances with concurrent INDPRO and HOUST growth.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing starts (HOUST) above 1,600 thousand units signals strong demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite rising HOUST.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and low interest rates (FEDFUNDS) indicates a strong labor market with accommodative monetary policy, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: labor market strength with accommodative policy
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite strong PAYEMS and low FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in inflation (CPIAUCSL) below 270 signals disinflationary pressures, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as central banks delay rate hikes.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite falling CPIAUCSL.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production (INDPRO) and payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicate robust supply-side capacity and labor market strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances with concurrent INDPRO and PAYEMS growth.
